full_text:
Man Wei (Gongheng) 滿偉 (公衡)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Man Wei (滿偉), styledGongheng (公衡). Tall and of good reputation, made a commoner by Sima Zhao after falling ill during camapign. Man Wei was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
